headline: Seagate Technology Gets Bold $620 Target From Bernstein — Buy the Dip?
summary: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) received a bullish price target raise from Bernstein on Tuesday, with the firm lifting the target to $620 from $500 while keeping an Outperform rating. The call directly challenges the TurboQuant-driven selloff that has hammered storage stocks over the past week. The call is direct: the fear is misplaced, the dip is ...
